title: DANTE AT EMBER & ASH
subtitle: CAMEO · VII·Chariot · 11:14 AM · Two months before the wreck
epigraph_upright: Dante drives over from the boat in the long black car. He has not been to Antonio's warehouse since the expansion. The Tuesday morning crew is on the floor. Jimmy is on the back stair with two coffees. Antonio is at the desk with the ledger open.
epigraph_reversed: Dante drives over. He looks at the books. He decides, this Tuesday, the kindness is the not-mentioning. He drives back to the boat without saying what he saw. Two months later, on the night of the wreck, the not-mentioning becomes a different kind of choice.
scene_description: Easy cameo. The Emperor at the Chariot's warehouse. Dante visits Antonio's place of business for the first time since the expansion. He has come to witness.
direction_hint: Climb the office. Look at the books. Don't say what you're thinking. Connect with Jimmy. Leap.
opening_log_lines: 11:14 AM. Dante's car at the curb across.
Antonio at the desk. The ledger open.
Jimmy on the back stair with two coffees.

scenario_action_cards.title: LOOK AT THE BOOKS
scenario_action_cards.flavor: Antonio leaves the office for two minutes. You look at the ledger. The numbers are, in your reading, two months from where they need to be. You close the ledger. You do not, today, mention it.

scenario_action_cards.title: DON'T SAY WHAT YOU'RE THINKING
scenario_action_cards.flavor: You suppress the sentence. You let your face be the face it is. You let the not-mentioning be the kindness.

effects.note: the small fractional widening of the eyes

scenario_visitors.name: Antonio (at the ledger)
scenario_visitors.lore_text: Antonio at the desk in his own warehouse with his father in the doorway for the first time since the expansion. He is, this Tuesday, on his best behavior.

steps.greet: Antonio stands. He shakes your hand at the desk. He does not, this morning, take you on the tour first.
steps.listen: He shows you the floor from the office's leaded window. He names the men by name.
steps.deliver: He asks: what do you think. You say the small declarative sentence you came prepared to say.
steps.sit_with: You sit at the desk for ninety seconds without speaking. Antonio does not, this Tuesday, fill the silence.

scenario_visitors.name: Jimmy (with two coffees)
scenario_visitors.lore_text: Antonio's crew chief Jimmy. Sixteen years on a hammer. Reads the room better than Antonio does and knows it. He has, this Tuesday morning, the second coffee for whichever of you wants it.

steps.greet: Jimmy raises the second cup. You take it. He does not, this Tuesday, comment on the suit.
steps.listen: He tells you about the cypress beam Frasier inspected last week. He says, mildly, that he thought Frasier's read was right.
steps.deliver: You hand him your card. He pockets it. He does not, this Tuesday, say what he intends to do with it.
steps.sit_with: You stand on the back stair with him through one full cigarette. He smokes Camels. You did not, today, know that.

stagnation_thresholds.label: the warehouse on a tuesday morning.
antonio is on his best behavior. you have, by minute eight, noticed.
the ledger on the desk is, by minute twelve, harder not to read.
you drove back to the boat without taking the tour.

doubt_thresholds.label: the numbers in the ledger are two months from where they need to be.
the wreck is, this Tuesday, two months away.

notes: Easy cameo · Dante witnessing Antonio's expansion. Novel mechanic: WITNESS-WITHOUT-SPEAKING. dont_say_what_youre_thinking is a Time-0 silent-presence card that advances Antonio's connection through the not-mentioning. First cameo where holding-back is a played verb.
ambient_pool: the cypress beam over the warehouse floor is, today, straight.
jimmy's camels are mostly hidden in the breast pocket.
the ledger on the desk is open to the wrong page.
